notes: Project profile validates with wp-gutenberg-designer scripts.
Runtime verified by scripts/verify-runtime.mjs against http://100.70.222.25:8093.
WordPress is served by a user-level systemd service without Docker.
Source WordPress :8092 page inventory extracted as plain text only.
Existing Astro/block-theme code is reference-only and must not be imported.
User approved public 56-page inventory as source for the page plan.
lmhg@personal is candidate reference-only; exact data must be confirmed before use or visible WordPress changes.
Imported four LMHG reference datasets into planning artifacts only: topology/relationships, SEO metadata/schema, page-type/field contracts, and brand/design/Gutenberg adaptation rules.
LMHG-derived data remains gated for clean/dirty review and page-type implementation approval before WordPress writes.
User confirmed approved page/template categories should carry forward as distinct Gutenberg templates with consistent header and footer.
Generated Gutenberg template map as planning-only artifact; no WordPress visible surface changes.
Recorded user-confirmed nested Services menu relationships as planning-only data; no WordPress navigation or page-parent write.
Recorded sitewide header, footer, CTA, Locations menu, and Gutenberg-native breadcrumb plan; no WordPress visible surface changes.

accessGaps: Public REST does not expose menu-items on the source site: /wp-json/wp/v2/menu-items returns 401.
Public REST did not expose SEO title, meta description, or canonical fields.
Application access is needed for draft/private pages, menus, custom fields, SEO plugin metadata, redirects, and plugin inventory.

lmhgPersonalPlugin.rule: Before using LMHG plugin data, list the exact datasets/files/fields to be read and get user confirmation. Do not use that data to change the fresh WordPress visible surface without explicit approval.

datasets.importedAs: primary parent candidates, related-child candidates, template-family review queues
title, meta description, primary/secondary keywords, phrase headings, schema vocabulary, copy brief fields
templateFamily, page type, schema type, visible vs hidden field rules
voice, palette, card/hero/CTA constraints, Gutenberg Basics adaptation notes

gates: User must classify fields/pages as clean or dirty before implementation.
User must approve each page-type Gutenberg Basics implementation pass.
No WordPress page creation, metadata write, template edit, or surface change without explicit approval.
No Astro, Starwind, CSS, visual asset, theme template, or block markup import.

gutenbergTemplateMap.guardrail: Planning artifact only; no WordPress theme/template/page write until user approves implementation.

serviceNavigationPlan.guardrail: Planning artifact only; no WordPress navigation, page-parent, template, or visible surface change until user approves implementation.

sitewideNavigationPlan.breadcrumbsTarget: Gutenberg-native patterns generated from approved relationships
sitewideNavigationPlan.guardrail: Planning artifact only; no WordPress navigation, template, page, or visible surface change until user approves implementation.
